display.purpose: Specimen titles on detail pages. The largest single thing on any page.

headline.purpose: Field titles and the home wordmark inside the viewfinder.

title.purpose: Specimen entry names in the field index, 'Field notes' section heading.

body.purpose: Italic descriptions, eyebrow taglines, field-note prompt blocks. Capped at 68ch.

label.purpose: Every chrome label, breadcrumb, button, ordinal, telemetry stamp.

metadata.purpose: Specimen tag rows and the metadata band on detail pages.

motion.name: ease-warp
motion.purpose: Default ease for warp transitions, hover scales, and chrome state changes.

motion.name: ease-viewfinder
motion.purpose: Reserved for slower instrument movements (warp viewfinder rotation).

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Default chrome state transitions (button hover, opacity fades).

motion.name: duration-warp
motion.purpose: Main blur+dim during route warp transition.

motion.name: duration-disc
motion.purpose: Specimen disc hover scale + border tint.

motion.name: duration-warp-cycle
motion.purpose: Total lifespan of the body.warping class during a route change.

components.name: Command Button
components.description: Primary chrome button. Square corners, mono small caps, hairline border. Used as 'Copy field notes' on detail pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-command { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: #F4EFE3; border: 1px solid rgba(140, 136, 120, 0.5); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1); } .ds-btn-command:hover { color: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); } .ds-btn-command:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-command:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.86 0.06 220); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Replay Overlay Button
components.description: Smaller overlay command. Sits at the corner of a specimen disc on detail pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-replay { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: rgba(22, 25, 34, 0.7); color: #C9C2B0; border: 1px solid rgba(140, 136, 120, 0.5); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1); } .ds-btn-replay:hover { color: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); border-color: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); } .ds-btn-replay:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.86 0.06 220); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Specimen Disc
components.description: Circular plate that holds a single motion pattern's live demo. Hover-scaled when used inside a group; static on detail pages.
components.css: .ds-specimen-group { display: inline-block; } .ds-specimen-disc { position: relative; width: 220px; height: 220px; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(140, 136, 120, 0.4); background: #11141A; transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1), border-color 500ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1); } .ds-specimen-group:hover .ds-specimen-disc { transform: scale(1.03); border-color: rgba(146, 196, 232, 0.7); } .ds-specimen-content { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: #8C8878; }

components.name: Field Plate Heading
components.description: Editorial title block of a field (category) on the home page index. No card chrome; typography on the plate-black surface.
components.html:
FIELD 01 · 03 SPECIMENS

Hover Effects

Cursor-driven feedback that makes interfaces feel alive and responsive.

Enter field →
components.css: .ds-field-plate { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 48px 0; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-field-ordinal { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #8C8878; } .ds-field-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #F4EFE3; } .ds-field-desc { margin: 0; max-width: 28rem; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #C9C2B0; } .ds-field-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #8C8878; transition: color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1); } .ds-field-plate:hover .ds-field-cta { color: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Telemetry-stamp toast for transient feedback. Square corners, hairline border on all four sides. Status comes from a leading 8x8 colored square (cool-star = success, safelight-amber = error), never from a side stripe.
components.html: FIELD NOTES COPIED
components.css: .ds-toast { display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 16px; background: #161922; border: 1px solid #2A2E36; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #F4EFE3; } .ds-toast-dot { display: block; width: 8px; height: 8px; margin-top: 3px; background: oklch(0.86 0.06 220); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toast-text { line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Corner Telemetry Stamp
components.description: Top-right fixed corner stamp showing observatory station, conditions, and the live sidereal clock. Mirrored at top-left as the wordmark stamp.
components.css: .ds-telemetry-stamp { position: fixed; top: 24px; right: 24px; text-align: right; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #8C8878; pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .ds-telemetry-stamp > div:first-child { color: #C9C2B0; } .ds-clock { color: #C9C2B0; }

components.name: Viewfinder
components.description: SVG circular bezel with N/E/S/W coordinate markers. Used at hero scale on the home page; smaller bezel around specimen discs on detail pages.
components.css: .ds-viewfinder { position: relative; width: 320px; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; color: #8C8878; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-viewfinder svg { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

narrative.overview: Motionary's surface is a long-exposure photographic plate. The dark plate (plate-black) is loaded into the camera back; the wordmark, viewfinder markers, and editorial body sit on top of it as if developed in cool paper ink. Each motion pattern is collected as a circular specimen disc, stamped, telemetry-tagged, and held against the plate the way a botanical illustration sits in a 19th-century field guide. The Atacama corner stamp, the sidereal LST clock ticking at one Hertz, the drifting starfield, and the warp transition between routes all serve one image: a working observatory, recording motion at the limits of sensitivity. The system rejects the usual dev-tool reflexes by name: slate-on-cyan, pill-shaped nav, neon halos, glassmorphism, generic Tailwind starters, AI-orb chrome, gradient text, and 'AI startup landing-page template' energy are prohibited. Two typefaces, one cool-blue interactive accent, hairline rules, square corners on every chrome button. Surfaces stay quiet; motion is loud.
keyCharacteristics: Paper-cream type on a near-black photographic plate, no light mode
One cool-blue accent (cool-star) used sparingly for hover, focus, active state, and a single tracking dot
Italic Fraunces display set against JetBrains Mono small caps metadata, like a science journal
Circular specimen discs frame every motion pattern; nothing is rectangular
Hairline 1px rules between sections, never harsh borders
Square-cornered chrome buttons (rounded: 0); the only rounded-full surface is the specimen disc itself
A drifting starfield, a sidereal LST clock, and corner telemetry stamps run as ambient observatory layer behind every page
Route changes cue a warp transition: blur, dim, and a 'TRANSITION · LOCKED' overlay; reduced motion collapses it to an opacity dip

rules.name: The Cool-Star Rule
rules.body: The accent (cool-star) appears only as a response to user intent: hover, focus, active, currently-selected state, or the live tracking indicator. It never colors a default surface. If you can't justify it as a state response, remove it.

rules.name: The Pure-Black Ban
rules.body: #000 is forbidden on every surface. The plate is #0B0D12, never absolute black. The same applies to the warm side: no #FFF ever, only field-cream.

rules.name: The Italic-Display Rule
rules.body: Display, headline, title, and body roles are always italic Fraunces. Roman Fraunces is forbidden in this system. The italic register is the editorial voice; switching to roman reads as a missing decision.

rules.name: The Small-Caps Mono Rule
rules.body: Every JetBrains Mono usage is uppercase (via text-transform: uppercase or capital letters in source) with at least 0.18em letter-spacing. Lowercase mono reads as a code listing, not a telemetry stamp.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any chrome surface. Specimen discs, field plates, buttons, toasts, viewfinders all live at the surface plane. If you reach for a shadow, you are about to write a different design system.

rules.name: The Tonal-Stack Rule
rules.body: When two surfaces sit on top of each other (toast over plate, specimen disc over field plate), step the shade in the direction of the relationship: raised goes one step lighter (astrograph), inset goes one step darker (halo-well). Never use the same tone for stacked surfaces.

dos: Do keep cool-star reserved for state response (hover, focus, active, live tracking). Never use it on a default surface.
Do set every chrome button at 44 × 44 minimum hit area.
Do use square corners on every chrome button (rounded: 0). The specimen disc is the only rounded-full element in the system.
Do use 1 px hairline rules between sections, never thicker borders.
Do italicize every Fraunces usage. Roman Fraunces does not exist in this system.
Do uppercase every JetBrains Mono usage with at least 0.18em letter-spacing.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion in every motion: starfield pauses, warp collapses to a 200ms opacity fade, demos collapse to their static end-state.
Do keep body copy at 65-75ch; field-note prompts cap at 68ch on the detail page.
Do vary spacing rhythm: 8 / 16 / 24 / 48 / 80 / 128. Same padding everywhere reads as monotony.
donts: Don't use light mode. The long-exposure register is fundamentally paper-on-void; light mode would dilute the metaphor.
Don't use #000 or #fff. The plate is plate-black (#0B0D12); the ink is field-cream (#F4EFE3).
Don't ship gradient text. Use a single solid color and emphasize via weight or size.
Don't apply glassmorphism decoratively. Backdrop-blur exists on the replay button and the warp overlay; nowhere else.
Don't use box-shadow anywhere in the chrome. The Flat-By-Default Rule applies.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1 px on any surface. The toast carries status via a leading 8x8 px square dot, not a colored side edge. There are no exceptions to this ban.
Don't ship 'AI startup landing-page template' energy: chrome 3D blobs, neon halos, gradient meshes behind hero text, identical card grids of feature bullets.
Don't use 'Tailwind starter' defaults: slate-900 + indigo-500, rounded-2xl cards, pill nav, badges in the corners of every component.
Don't add em dashes to copy. Use commas, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't wrap demos in nested cards. The specimen disc is the disc; it is not inside another card.
Don't introduce a third typeface. Fraunces italic + JetBrains Mono is the entire system.
